grades.expectation: Response identifies 95 years as relatively safe for most lenders
grades.reason: Clearly states 'GREEN BAND - No concerns' and shows all major lenders are eligible

grades.expectation: Response notes no marriage value applies (above 80 years)
grades.reason: Explicitly states 'Marriage value: Won't apply (only kicks in under 80 years)'

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific lender thresholds showing 95 years is acceptable
grades.reason: Lists specific lenders with their year requirements (Nationwide 55+, Barclays/Halifax/Lloyds 70+, Virgin Money 85+)

grades.expectation: Response suggests extension is still worthwhile for future value protection
grades.reason: States 'Consider extension when it drops to around 85-90 years to maintain maximum value'

grades.expectation: Response does NOT treat this as an urgent/critical issue
grades.reason: Uses 'GREEN BAND - No concerns', 'Proceed with confidence', and 'No action needed before completion'
